Thanks for opening a PR.

**The maintainer is presenting at ML Prague 2026 and is not reviewing external PRs until ~2026-05-15.**

If your change is small (typo, README clarification, doc fix), it may still be reviewed during the conference window. Otherwise, please [file an issue](https://github.com/Ocean-Synaptics/roadmap/issues/new/choose) first so we can discuss before you write code — this avoids wasted work for both of us.

After 2026-05-15, this template will be replaced with full PR review guidance and a `CONTRIBUTING.md`. See [docs/ROLLOUT.md](../docs/ROLLOUT.md) for the contribution timeline.
